query: SELECT id, name, email, COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) as device_count FROM users WHERE deviceId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING device_count > 1 LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT id, name, email, COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) as device_count FROM users WHERE deviceId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING device_count > 1 LIMIT 10;
